projects.name: Merchant Settlement Reconciliation Pipeline
projects.description: Replacement reconciliation system at Stripe that processes 4.2B ledger entries per day via Kafka and Flink streaming pipeline, replacing a legacy Hadoop batch job. Reduced end-to-end reconciliation latency from 14 hours to 38 minutes (p99) and cut compute cost by 61% (~$2.3M/year).

projects.name: Metrics Tail-Aggregation Pipeline (Longtail)
projects.description: Re-architected Datadog's tail-aggregation service for high-cardinality customer metrics using a custom sharded RocksDB store with consistent hashing across 2,400 ingestion nodes. Increased sustained write throughput from 1.1M points/sec to 8.4M points/sec on the same hardware footprint.
